3334190.name: Thinking Inside The Box
3334190.description:
You play as a little, square guy trapped in a maze of cardboard boxes filled with a myriad of challenges. The rules are simple: move the diamonds to the appropriate pressure plates without letting different-colored diamonds touch—swap, push, and phase to complete levels as quickly as possible. Do you have what it takes?

This is my first ever full-release game, so any improvement ideas are always appreciated. Feel free to leave a review or message me directly. Hope you enjoy!
